subcodes.first_line: O Mohsen! Bear thou witness with thy tongue and heart to that whereunto the Dove hath testified upon the sacred and lofty branches, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محسن ان اشهد بلسانک و قلبک بما شهدت الورقا علی افنان قدس منیعا بانه
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
